title: Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is Hiring: Floor Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners:
Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poorvika Mobiles South Asia Partners!
